questions.question: Hijama therapy ka primary objective kya hai?

options.A: Body se toxic blood aur impurities ko remove karna.
options.B: Sirf skin ko massage karna.

questions.explanation: Hijama ka mukhya uddeshya sharir se impurities aur stagnant blood ko nikal kar detoxification karna hai.

questions.question: Wet cupping mein, skin par chote incisions banane ka main reason kya hai?

options.A: Blood flow ko completely stop karna.
options.B: Toxins ko blood ke saath bahar nikalne ka rasta provide karna.
options.D: Skin ko stimulate karna, par blood na nikalna.

questions.explanation: Chote incisions banaye jaate hain taaki cupping ke baad vacuum create hone par stagnant blood aur toxins skin se bahar nikal saken.

questions.question: Hijama ko 'Sunnah' treatment kyu kaha jaata hai?

options.A: Kyunki yeh sirf Muslim countries mein kiya jaata hai.
options.B: Kyunki Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) ne isko practice aur recommend kiya tha.
options.C: Kyunki yeh ancient Egypt se originate hua hai.
options.D: Kyunki yeh sirf spiritual healing ke liye hai.

questions.explanation: Hijama ko 'Sunnah' treatment isliye kaha jaata hai kyunki Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) ne isko practice aur recommend kiya tha, aur iske anek swasthya labh bataye the.

questions.question: Dry cupping aur wet cupping mein kya basic difference hai?

options.A: Dry cupping mein heat use hoti hai, wet cupping mein nahi.
options.B: Dry cupping mein blood nahi nikala jaata, wet cupping mein incisions banakar blood nikala jaata hai.
options.C: Wet cupping sirf face par hoti hai, dry cupping body par.
options.D: Dry cupping mein cups plastic ke hote hain, wet cupping mein glass ke.

questions.explanation: Dry cupping mein sirf vacuum create kiya jaata hai skin ko upar kheechne ke liye, jabki wet cupping mein chote incisions banakar blood aur toxins ko remove kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke liye kaunsa body part sabse common aur safe mana jaata hai?

options.B: Upper back (shoulders ke beech).

questions.explanation: Upper back, especially shoulders ke beech ka area, Hijama ke liye sabse common aur safe points mein se ek hai, jahan nerves aur major blood vessels ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Hijama se blood circulation kaise improve hota hai?

options.A: Yeh blood vessels ko constrict karta hai.
options.B: Vacuum effect se stagnant blood ko surface par pull karta hai aur naye blood flow ko stimulate karta hai.
options.C: Yeh body mein blood production badhata hai.
options.D: Yeh blood pressure ko significantly high karta hai.

questions.explanation: Hijama cups ka vacuum effect stagnant blood ko skin surface par kheenchta hai, jisse wahan ka blood flow improve hota hai aur naye, oxygenated blood ka circulation stimulate hota hai.

questions.question: Hijama mein use hone wale cups kis material ke ho sakte hain?

options.B: Plastic, glass, bamboo ya ceramic.

questions.explanation: Hijama mein alag-alag materials jaise plastic, glass, bamboo aur ceramic ke cups use kiye jaate hain, har ek ke apne fayde aur uses hote hain.

questions.question: Agar patient ko bleeding disorder hai, toh Hijama practitioner ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf dry cupping apply karna chahiye.
options.C: Wet cupping avoid karna chahiye aur medical advice lena chahiye.
options.D: High vacuum pressure apply karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Bleeding disorders Hijama, especially wet cupping, ke liye ek serious contraindication hain. Practitioner ko aise cases mein wet cupping avoid karna chahiye aur patient ko medical professional se consult karne ki salah deni chahiye.

questions.question: Hijama se muscles mein stiffness aur pain kaise kam hota hai?

options.A: Yeh muscles ko paralyze kar deta hai.
options.B: Vacuum se blood flow badhta hai, jisse inflammation aur tension kam hota hai.
options.C: Yeh muscles ke size ko kam karta hai.

questions.explanation: Cupping se blood circulation improve hota hai, jisse muscles mein accumulated toxins nikal jaate hain aur inflammation kam hota hai, jiske parinamswaroop stiffness aur pain mein rahat milti hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke dauraan skin par jo circular marks (bruises) dikhte hain, unka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Yeh normal hai, jisme stagnant blood surface par aata hai.
options.C: Yeh hamesha galat technique ka sign hai.
options.D: Yeh skin allergy ka sign hai.

questions.explanation: Hijama ke baad skin par dikhne wale circular marks, ya 'cupping marks', normal hote hain. Yeh stagnant blood aur toxins ka surface par aane ka indication hain aur kuch dino mein apne aap theek ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Hijama ke benefits mein se kaunsa ek major benefit hai?

options.B: Immune system ko boost karna.
options.D: Hair growth ko completely stop karna.

questions.explanation: Hijama body se toxins nikal kar aur blood circulation improve karke immune system ko strengthen karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Kaunsi condition mein Hijama completely contraindicated hai?

options.B: High fever ya acute infection.

questions.explanation: High fever ya koi acute infection hone par Hijama nahi karna chahiye, kyunki yeh body ke immune response ko affect kar sakta hai aur condition ko bigaad sakta hai. Body pehle se hi stressed hoti hai.

questions.question: Hijama mein incisions banane ke liye commonly kya use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Sterile surgical blades ya lancets.

questions.explanation: Hijama mein skin par incisions banane ke liye hamesha sterile surgical blades ya lancets ka upyog kiya jaata hai, taaki infection ka risk kam ho.

questions.question: Anatomy ke hisaab se, Hijama ke liye kaunse areas ko avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Over major arteries, veins, lymph nodes, ya delicate organs.

questions.explanation: Major arteries, veins, lymph nodes, delicate organs (jaise aankhen, navel), aur fractured bones ke upar cupping avoid karna chahiye taaki serious complications se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Hijama se detoxification process kaise hota hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf body mein water level badhata hai.
options.B: Yeh stagnant blood aur metabolic waste products ko skin surface par pull karke remove karta hai.
options.C: Yeh liver function ko block karta hai.
options.D: Yeh body mein oxygen level kam karta hai.

questions.explanation: Hijama body se stagnant blood, metabolic waste products, aur toxins ko skin surface par kheench kar remove karta hai, jisse body ka natural detoxification process enhance hota hai.

questions.question: Hijama se pehle patient ko kya advice deni chahiye?

options.A: Heavy meal kha kar aana chahiye.
options.B: Hydrated rehna chahiye aur light meal lena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Hijama se pehle patient ko hydrated rehne aur light meal lene ki advice deni chahiye, taaki dizziness ya weakness na ho.

questions.question: Hijama ke dauraan patient ko kya feel ho sakta hai?

options.B: Mild pulling sensation aur pressure.

questions.explanation: Hijama ke dauraan patient ko generally mild pulling sensation aur pressure feel hota hai, jo cupping ke vacuum effect ke karan hota hai.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ke liye sabse important safety measure kya hai?

options.A: Patient ko bahut der tak wait karana.
options.B: Strict sterilization aur hygiene protocols follow karna.
options.D: Patient ke saath zyada baat karna.

questions.explanation: Infection se bachne aur patient safety ensure karne ke liye strict sterilization aur hygiene protocols follow karna Hijama practitioner ke liye paramount hai.

questions.question: Used blades aur lancets ka disposal kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Sharps container mein.
options.C: Sink mein flush kar dena chahiye.
options.D: Patient ko ghar le jaane ke liye de dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Used blades aur lancets ko hamesha puncture-proof sharps container mein dispose karna chahiye taaki accidental pricks aur infection ka risk na ho.

questions.question: Hijama se pehle skin ko clean aur disinfect karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf skin ko smooth banane ke liye.
options.B: Infection aur contamination ke risk ko kam karne ke liye.
options.C: Cupping marks ko zyada dark karne ke liye.
options.D: Patient ko fresh feel karane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Skin ko clean aur disinfect karna infection ke pathogens ko remove karta hai, jisse procedure ke dauraan infection ka risk significantly kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Hijama practitioner ko pehanna chahiye?

options.B: Sterile gloves, face mask aur clean apron.

questions.explanation: Sterile gloves, face mask aur clean apron practitioner ko bloodborne pathogens aur other contaminants se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Cups ko sterilize karne ke liye kaunsa method sabse effective hai?

options.B: Autoclave ya high-level chemical disinfection.

questions.explanation: Autoclave ya high-level chemical disinfection cups se saare microorganisms, including bacteria, viruses, aur spores, ko effectively eliminate karta hai.

questions.question: Agar practitioner ko accidental needle stick injury ho jaaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant wound ko wash karna, antiseptic lagana aur medical attention lena.

questions.explanation: Accidental needle stick injury ke case mein, turant wound ko thoroughly wash karna, antiseptic lagana, aur immediate medical attention lena bahut zaroori hai taaki potential infections (jaise Hepatitis, HIV) ko prevent kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Bio-medical waste (blood-soaked cotton, tissues) ka disposal kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Specified biohazard bags aur containers mein.
options.C: Open air mein fek dena chahiye.
options.D: Toilet mein flush kar dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Bio-medical waste ko proper biohazard bags aur containers mein dispose karna chahiye, jiska baad mein authorized agencies dwara safe processing kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Hijama clinic mein workstation ko clean rakhne ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Cross-contamination aur infection ke spread ko rokne ke liye.
options.C: Patient ko bore karne ke liye.
options.D: Equipment ko zyada der tak chalane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Clean workstation cross-contamination ke risk ko kam karta hai, jisse patient aur practitioner dono ki safety ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Antiseptics aur disinfectants mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Antiseptics sirf surfaces par use hote hain, disinfectants living tissues par.
options.B: Antiseptics living tissues par use hote hain, disinfectants non-living surfaces par.
options.C: Dono same cheez hain, bas alag naam hain.
options.D: Antiseptics sirf bacteria marte hain, disinfectants sirf viruses.

questions.explanation: Antiseptics living tissues par use kiye jaate hain (jaise skin ko clean karna), jabki disinfectants non-living surfaces aur equipment ko sterilize karne ke liye hote hain.

questions.question: Hijama ke dauraan blood exposure hone par immediate action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Area ko clean karna aur appropriate disinfectant se sanitize karna.

questions.explanation: Blood exposure hone par turant us area ko clean karna aur appropriate disinfectant se sanitize karna zaroori hai taaki pathogens ka spread roka ja sake.

questions.question: Kaunsa disinfectant Hijama procedure mein skin preparation ke liye commonly use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Rubbing alcohol (Isopropyl alcohol) ya Povidone-iodine.

questions.explanation: Rubbing alcohol ya Povidone-iodine effective antiseptics hain jo skin ko clean aur disinfect karne ke liye use kiye jaate hain, infection risk ko kam karte hain.

questions.question: Agar patient procedure ke dauraan faint ho jaaye toh practitioner ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cups remove karna, patient ko flat litana aur legs upar karna, aur first aid apply karna.

questions.explanation: Fainting ke case mein, turant cups remove karna, patient ko flat litana, legs upar karna (blood flow brain tak badhane ke liye), aur first aid dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad wounds ko cover karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf patient ko acha feel karane ke liye.
options.B: Infection se bachane aur healing promote karne ke liye.
options.C: Wounds ko aur zyada bleed karane ke liye.
options.D: Skin ko tan karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Wounds ko sterile dressing se cover karne se bacteria aur contaminants se bachav hota hai, jisse infection ka risk kam hota hai aur healing process fast hota hai.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek patient se dusre patient tak infection ka spread.
options.B: Sirf ek hi patient ke andar infection.

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ka matlab hai pathogens ka ek patient se dusre patient tak ya non-sterile objects se sterile objects tak transfer hona, jo improper hygiene practices se hota hai.

questions.question: Hijama room mein proper ventilation kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf practitioner ko fresh air dene ke liye.
options.B: Airborne contaminants aur odours ko remove karne ke liye.
options.C: Room ko garam rakhne ke liye.
options.D: Patient ko neend aane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation airborne contaminants (jaise dust, bacteria) aur blood ke odours ko remove karne mein madad karta hai, jisse ek safer aur more comfortable environment banta hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke dauraan kaunsi cheezein 'single-use' honi chahiye?

options.B: Lancets/blades, gloves, cotton swabs.

questions.explanation: Lancets/blades, gloves, cotton swabs aur dressings jaise items single-use hone chahiye taaki cross-contamination aur infection ka risk completely eliminate ho sake.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko kitni baar hands sanitize ya wash karne chahiye?

options.B: Har patient se pehle aur baad mein, aur jab bhi zaroorat ho.

questions.explanation: Hands ko har patient se pehle aur baad mein, aur jab bhi potentially contaminated ho, sanitize ya wash karna chahiye. Yeh infection control ka basic aur sabse effective step hai.

questions.question: Hijama mein vacuum create karne ke liye sabse common equipment kya hai?

options.B: Manual hand pump ya electric pump.

questions.explanation: Modern Hijama mein cups ke andar vacuum create karne ke liye manual hand pump ya electric pump ka use kiya jaata hai, jo easy aur safe hota hai.

questions.question: Plastic cups ka kya fayda hai over glass cups?

options.A: Plastic cups zyada durable aur kam breakable hote hain.
options.B: Plastic cups zyada hot rehte hain.
options.C: Plastic cups zyada heavy hote hain.
options.D: Plastic cups ko sterilize karna mushkil hai.

questions.explanation: Plastic cups generally zyada durable, lightweight aur kam breakable hote hain, making them safer aur easier to handle, especially for beginners.

questions.question: Fire cupping mein aag ka kya role hai?

options.B: Cup ke andar oxygen ko burn karke vacuum create karna.

questions.explanation: Fire cupping mein, aag ka use cup ke andar ki oxygen ko burn karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, jisse ek vacuum banta hai aur cup skin par suction create karta hai.

questions.question: Wet cupping ke liye incisions kitne deep hone chahiye?

options.B: Sirf epidermis (superficial layer) tak, taaki capillaries se blood nikle.

questions.explanation: Incisions bahut superficial hone chahiye, sirf epidermis tak, taaki capillaries se stagnant blood nikal sake aur major blood vessels ya nerves ko damage na ho.

questions.question: Glide cupping mein kya kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Cups ko ek jagah par fix rakha jaata hai.
options.B: Cups ko skin par oil lagakar move kiya jaata hai.
options.C: Cups ko bahut zyada pressure se lagaya jaata hai.
options.D: Cups ko jaldi se remove kiya jaata hai.

questions.explanation: Glide cupping mein, skin par oil lagakar cups ko suction ke saath move kiya jaata hai, jo massage effect deta hai aur blood flow improve karta hai.

questions.question: Hijama mein vacuum pressure adjust karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf cups ko tight rakhne ke liye.
options.B: Patient ke comfort, skin type aur desired therapeutic effect ke according.
options.C: Jitna zyada pressure, utna acha result.
options.D: Pressure ka koi role nahi hai.

questions.explanation: Vacuum pressure ko patient ke comfort level, skin sensitivity, area of treatment, aur desired therapeutic outcome ke according adjust karna zaroori hai. Excessive pressure bruising aur discomfort ka karan ban sakta hai, jabki kam pressure ineffective ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke liye cups ko skin par kitni der tak rakha jaata hai?

options.B: Generally 5-10 minutes for first suction, then 5-10 minutes for second suction.
options.D: Jab tak patient ko dard na ho.

questions.explanation: Wet cupping mein, pehle suction ke liye 5-10 minutes, phir incisions ke baad doosre suction ke liye 5-10 minutes ka time frame common hai. Yeh patient ki condition par bhi depend karta hai.

questions.question: Agar cup skin par theek se stick na ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Vacuum seal properly nahi bana hai ya skin par hair zyada hain.
options.C: Patient ko pasina aa raha hai.

questions.explanation: Agar cup theek se stick nahi ho raha hai, toh iska matlab hai ki vacuum seal properly nahi bana hai. Yeh skin par hair, uneven surface, ya inadequate suction ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Hijama mein use hone wale lancets ya blades ki kya quality honi chahiye?

options.B: Sterile, sharp aur single-use.

questions.explanation: Lancets ya blades hamesha sterile, sharp aur single-use hone chahiye taaki precise incisions banaye ja saken aur infection ka risk bilkul na ho.

questions.question: Massage cupping mein vacuum pressure kaisa hona chahiye?

options.A: Very strong, skin ko tight hold karne ke liye.
options.B: Light to medium, taaki cups ko smoothly glide kiya ja sake.
options.C: Itna kam ki cup gir jaaye.
options.D: Sirf dry cupping ke liye high pressure.

questions.explanation: Massage cupping mein light to medium pressure rakha jaata hai taaki cups ko skin par smoothly move kiya ja sake, aur massage effect mil sake.

questions.question: Hijama cups remove karne ka sahi tarika kya hai?

options.B: Vacuum release valve ko press karke, phir gently remove karna.
options.D: Patient ko khud remove karne dena.

questions.explanation: Vacuum release valve ko press karke air ko andar aane dena chahiye, jisse suction break ho jaati hai aur cups ko gently remove kiya ja sakta hai bina skin ko damage kiye.

questions.question: Hijama ke dauraan blood collection ke liye kya use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Absorbent cotton ya gauze pads cups ke andar.

questions.explanation: Blood collection ke liye cups ke andar absorbent cotton ya gauze pads rakhe jaate hain, jo nikalne wale blood ko absorb kar lete hain aur easy disposal mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Flash cupping kya hai?

options.A: Cups ko long duration ke liye lagana.
options.B: Cups ko quickly lagana aur remove karna repeatedly.

questions.explanation: Flash cupping mein cups ko bahut kam time ke liye lagaya aur hataya jaata hai, repeatedly. Yeh skin ko stimulate karta hai aur light detoxification provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar patient ko cupping ke dauraan excessive pain ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Pressure kam karna ya cups remove kar dena chahiye.
options.D: Aur zyada cups laga dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Excessive pain indicates karta hai ki pressure bahut zyada hai ya patient ki skin sensitive hai. Pressure kam karna ya cups remove karna immediate action hona chahiye.

questions.question: Hijama ke liye kaunse size ke cups use karne chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek hi size ke cups.
options.B: Body part aur patient ke size ke according alag-alag sizes ke cups.

questions.explanation: Hijama mein alag-alag sizes ke cups use kiye jaate hain, jo body ke various parts aur patient ke body type ke according choose kiye jaate hain, taaki effective aur comfortable treatment ho sake.

questions.question: Incisions banane se pehle skin ko stretch karna kyu helpful ho sakta hai?

options.A: Incisions ko zyada deep banane ke liye.
options.B: Skin ko tight karke uniform aur superficial incisions banane mein madad karta hai.
options.C: Patient ko uncomfortable karne ke liye.
options.D: Blood flow ko rokne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Skin ko gently stretch karne se surface tight ho jaati hai, jisse practitioner ko uniform aur superficial incisions banane mein aasani hoti hai, aur unnecessary deep cuts se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke equipment ko kitni baar check karna chahiye for wear and tear?

options.B: Har use se pehle aur baad mein.

questions.explanation: Equipment ko har use se pehle aur baad mein check karna chahiye taaki koi damage ya malfunction na ho, jo procedure ki safety aur effectiveness ko affect kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Patient assessment mein sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Patient ka detailed medical history lena.
options.C: Patient ko koi bhi treatment karne ki permission de dena.

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi treatment se pehle patient ka detailed medical history lena bahut zaroori hai, jismein medical conditions, medications, allergies, aur previous treatments shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Kaunsi condition Hijama ke liye absolute contraindication hai?

options.B: Severe anemia ya bleeding disorders (e.g., hemophilia).

questions.explanation: Severe anemia aur bleeding disorders jaise conditions mein wet cupping se excessive blood loss ho sakta hai, jo jaanleva ho sakta hai. Isliye yeh absolute contraindications hain.

questions.question: Pregnant women ko Hijama kyu avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Kyunki unki skin bahut sensitive hoti hai.
options.B: Kyunki yeh fetus ko harm kar sakta hai ya preterm labor induce kar sakta hai.
options.C: Kyunki unhe cupping marks pasand nahi hote.
options.D: Kyunki pregnancy mein blood flow kam hota hai.

questions.explanation: Pregnancy mein Hijama, especially wet cupping, avoid karna chahiye kyunki isse premature contractions, fetal distress, ya infection ka risk ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar patient blood thinners le raha hai, toh wet cupping ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Wet cupping avoid karna chahiye ya doctor se consult karna chahiye.
options.C: High vacuum pressure use karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Blood thinners lene wale patients mein excessive bleeding ka risk zyada hota hai. Aise cases mein wet cupping avoid karna ya patient ke prescribing doctor se consult karna essential hai.

questions.question: Informed consent ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Patient ko bina bataye treatment start karna.
options.B: Patient ko procedure, risks, aur benefits ke baare mein inform karna aur unki written permission lena.
options.C: Sirf patient ko verbal permission dena.
options.D: Practitioner ko patient se koi sawal na poochhna.

questions.explanation: Informed consent ka matlab hai ki patient ko treatment ke baare mein poori jaankari ho (benefits, risks, alternatives) aur woh apni marzi se treatment ke liye agree kare, preferably written form mein.

questions.question: Hijama ke liye suitable cupping points kaise determine kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Patient ke symptoms, affected area, aur traditional Hijama points ke knowledge ke aadhar par.
options.D: Sirf jahan skin sabse zyada soft ho.

questions.explanation: Cupping points ka selection patient ke specific symptoms, affected body parts, aur traditional Hijama charts (Sunnah points) ke knowledge par based hota hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa factor patient ki cupping experience ko affect kar sakta hai?

options.B: Patient ka hydration level, diet, aur stress level.

questions.explanation: Patient ka hydration level, recent diet, stress level, aur overall health uske cupping experience aur treatment ke results ko significantly affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar patient ko skin infection (e.g., eczema, psoriasis, open wounds) hai treatment area par, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Us area par cupping karna chahiye.
options.B: Infected area ko avoid karna chahiye ya treatment postpone karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Infected skin par cupping karne se infection fail sakta hai ya condition bigad sakti hai. Aise cases mein infected area ko avoid karna ya treatment ko theek hone tak postpone karna chahiye.

questions.question: Patient communication mein kya important hai?

options.B: Clear, empathetic aur respectful communication, patient ke questions ka answer dena.
options.C: Patient ko bolne ka mauka na dena.
options.D: Sirf treatment ke baare mein baat karna.

questions.explanation: Effective communication patient ke trust ko build karta hai, unki concerns ko address karta hai, aur unhe procedure ke baare mein comfortable feel karata hai.

questions.question: Hijama se pehle patient ka blood pressure check karna kyu important hai?

options.B: Low ya high blood pressure ke patients mein cupping ke risks ko evaluate karne ke liye.
options.C: Blood pressure se cupping results mein koi farak nahi padta.

questions.explanation: Low blood pressure wale patients mein fainting ka risk zyada hota hai, aur high blood pressure wale patients mein complications ka risk. Blood pressure check karna safety ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke dauraan patient ki privacy kaise maintain karni chahiye?

options.A: Patient ko public mein treat karna.
options.B: Private room mein treat karna aur body parts ko drape karna.
options.C: Patient ko kapde utarne ke liye bolna aur koi draping na karna.
options.D: Privacy ka koi matlab nahi hai.

questions.explanation: Patient ki privacy aur dignity maintain karna ethical practice ka hissa hai. Iske liye private treatment area aur proper draping ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Kaunsi age group mein Hijama with caution kiya jaana chahiye?

options.B: Elderly (old age) aur very young children.

questions.explanation: Elderly aur very young children ki skin sensitive hoti hai aur unka immune system weak ho sakta hai. Isliye in age groups mein Hijama bahut caution ke saath aur light pressure se karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar patient ko allergies hain, toh practitioner ko kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Antiseptics, oils, aur materials se hone wali allergies.
options.D: Allergies ka Hijama se koi connection nahi.

questions.explanation: Practitioner ko patient se antiseptics, oils, latex (gloves), aur cupping cup materials se hone wali kisi bhi allergy ke baare mein poochhna chahiye taaki allergic reactions se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Hijama se pehle patient ko kis tarah ki information provide karni chahiye?

options.B: Procedure ka overview, potential sensations, aftercare instructions, aur possible side effects.

questions.explanation: Patient ko procedure ka overview, kya feel hoga, aftercare instructions, aur possible side effects ke baare mein poori jaankari deni chahiye taaki woh mentally prepared ho aur cooperation kare.

questions.question: Patient ke medications ki jaankari lena kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unki memory check karne ke liye.
options.B: Kuch medications (jaise blood thinners) Hijama ke saath interact kar sakte hain, jisse complications ho sakti hain.
options.C: Medications ka Hijama se koi lena dena nahi.
options.D: Practitioner ko doctor feel karane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Kuch medications, jaise blood thinners, immunosuppressants, ya steroids, Hijama ke risks ko badha sakte hain. Medications ki jaankari lena safety precaution hai.

questions.question: Agar patient ko severe fatigue ya weakness hai, toh Hijama karna chahiye?

options.B: Nahi, aise mein Hijama avoid karna ya postpone karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Severe fatigue ya weakness wale patient mein Hijama se aur zyada weakness ya dizziness ho sakti hai. Aise mein treatment avoid karna ya postpone karna behtar hai.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko patient ki body language par dhyan kyu dena chahiye?

options.A: Sirf patient ki personality judge karne ke liye.
options.B: Patient ke discomfort, pain ya anxiety ke signs ko recognize karne ke liye.
options.C: Body language ka cupping se koi matlab nahi.
options.D: Patient ko uncomfortable karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Patient ki body language (facial expressions, movements) se unke discomfort, pain, ya anxiety ke signs mil sakte hain, jisse practitioner ko procedure adjust karne mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Wet cupping procedure ka pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Skin ko clean aur disinfect karna.

questions.explanation: Hamesha skin ko clean aur disinfect karna chahiye taaki procedure ke dauraan infection ka risk kam ho.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad wounds par kya lagana chahiye?

options.B: Sterile dressing ya antiseptic cream.

questions.explanation: Wounds ko infection se bachane aur healing ko promote karne ke liye sterile dressing ya antiseptic cream lagana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad patient ko kya dietary advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Light, easily digestible aur nutritious food lena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Hijama ke baad body recovery mode mein hoti hai, isliye light, easily digestible aur nutritious food lena chahiye taaki body ko healing mein support mile.

questions.question: Agar patient ko cupping marks par itching ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Mild anti-itch cream lagana chahiye ya cool compress use karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Itching normal ho sakti hai. Mild anti-itch cream ya cool compress se rahat mil sakti hai. Khujane se infection ka risk badh sakta hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad patient ko kitni der tak strenuous physical activity avoid karni chahiye?

options.A: Turant exercise start kar dena chahiye.
options.B: Kam se kam 24-48 ghante tak.

questions.explanation: Hijama ke baad body ko recover hone ke liye time chahiye. Strenuous physical activity se blood flow badh sakta hai aur healing process disturb ho sakta hai, isliye 24-48 ghante ka rest advisable hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke dauraan patient ke discomfort ko manage karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Patient se baat karna band kar dena.
options.B: Patient se regularly communicate karna, unki position adjust karna, aur reassuring words use karna.

questions.explanation: Patient se open communication, unki physical comfort ka dhyan rakhna, aur unhe emotional support dena discomfort ko manage karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad patient ko kin signs ke liye monitor karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf cupping marks ke colour ke liye.
options.B: Excessive bleeding, severe pain, dizziness, ya infection ke signs (redness, swelling, pus).

questions.explanation: Patient ko ghar jaane ke baad excessive bleeding, severe pain, dizziness, ya infection ke signs ke liye monitor karna chahiye aur koi bhi abnormal symptom hone par practitioner ko contact karne ki advice deni chahiye.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad patient ko kitna paani peena chahiye?

options.B: Normal se zyada paani ya fluids.

questions.explanation: Hijama ke baad hydration bahut important hai. Zyada paani peene se body toxins ko flush out karne mein madad milti hai aur recovery fast hoti hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad patients ko bath ya shower lene se kyu mana kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf thand lagne ke darr se.
options.B: Wounds ko infection se bachane ke liye aur unhe dry rakhne ke liye, especially for 24 hours.
options.C: Marks ko dhone se rokne ke liye.
options.D: Patient ko zyada der tak saaf na rehne dene ke liye.

questions.explanation: Hijama ke baad, especially wet cupping ke wounds ko dry aur clean rakhna zaroori hai taaki infection na ho. Isliye 24 ghante tak bath ya shower avoid karne ki advice di jaati hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad wounds ko sunlight exposure se kyu bachana chahiye?

options.A: Sirf tan hone se rokne ke liye.
options.B: Hyperpigmentation (darkening) se bachane aur healing ko disturb hone se rokne ke liye.
options.C: Wounds ko garam rakhne ke liye.
options.D: Sunlight se healing fast hoti hai.

questions.explanation: Sunlight exposure, especially UV rays, healing wounds par hyperpigmentation ka karan ban sakte hain, jisse marks zyada visible ho sakte hain aur healing process slow ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Documentation aur record keeping ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf paper waste badhane ke liye.
options.B: Patient's progress track karne, legal protection, aur future treatments plan karne ke liye.
options.D: Patient ko zyada bills dene ke liye.

questions.explanation: Proper documentation se patient ki health history, treatment details, aur progress track ki ja sakti hai, jo future treatments plan karne aur legal issues mein helpful hoti hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad cupping marks kitne din mein fade ho jaate hain?

options.B: Generally 3-7 din mein, depending on intensity.
options.C: Ek mahine se zyada lagta hai.

questions.explanation: Cupping marks ki intensity aur patient ki skin type par depend karta hai, lekin generally woh 3-7 din mein fade ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad kis tarah ke kapde pehne ki advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Loose, comfortable aur breathable kapde.

questions.explanation: Loose aur breathable kapde wounds ko irritate nahi karte aur air circulation provide karte hain, jisse healing promote hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar patient ko procedure ke baad mild dizziness ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Patient ko thodi der rest karana chahiye, paani ya juice dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Mild dizziness common hai. Patient ko thodi der rest karana, hydrated rakhna, aur blood sugar maintain karne ke liye kuch मीठा dena helpful ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke baad skin par moisturizer lagana chahiye?

options.A: Wounds theek hone tak avoid karna chahiye.
options.B: Haan, turant lagana chahiye.

questions.explanation: Jab tak wounds completely heal na ho jaayen, tab tak moisturizer ya lotions lagane se bachna chahiye, kyunki isse irritation ya infection ho sakta hai. Healing ke baad lagaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Follow-up schedule kya hona chahiye Hijama ke baad?

options.B: Patient ki condition aur treatment plan ke according.

questions.explanation: Follow-up schedule patient ki initial condition, treatment ka response, aur specific health goals par depend karta hai. Isse practitioner patient ki progress monitor kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Hijama musculoskeletal pain (joint pain, back pain) mein kaise faydemand hai?

options.A: Yeh bones ko dissolve karta hai.
options.B: Blood flow badhata hai, inflammation kam karta hai, aur tight muscles ko relax karta hai.

questions.explanation: Hijama affected area mein blood circulation ko improve karta hai, jisse accumulated toxins nikalte hain aur inflammation kam hota hai, tight muscles relax hote hain aur pain mein rahat milti hai.

questions.question: Hijama aur acupuncture points ke beech kya relation hai?

options.A: Dono bilkul alag hain, koi relation nahi.
options.B: Hijama often traditional acupuncture points ya trigger points par kiya jaata hai.
options.C: Hijama sirf acupuncture points ko avoid karta hai.
options.D: Acupuncture Hijama ka hi ek type hai.

questions.explanation: Hijama aksar traditional acupuncture points ya trigger points par apply kiya jaata hai, kyunki yeh points energy flow (qi) aur therapeutic effects ke liye important hote hain.

questions.question: Ethical practice mein client confidentiality ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ki information kisi ko bhi bata dena.
options.B: Client ki personal aur medical information ko private aur secure rakhna.
options.C: Sirf client ki age private rakhna.
options.D: Client se koi information na lena.

questions.explanation: Client confidentiality ka matlab hai ki practitioner client ki personal aur medical information ko secret rakhega aur bina unki permission ke kisi ko disclose nahi karega.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko apni 'scope of practice' ke baare mein kya pata hona chahiye?

options.A: Woh koi bhi medical condition treat kar sakte hain.
options.B: Unhe pata hona chahiye ki woh kya treat kar sakte hain aur kya nahi, aur kab patient ko doctor ke paas refer karna hai.
options.C: Unhe kisi bhi rule ko follow nahi karna chahiye.
options.D: Sirf Hijama kar sakte hain, aur kuch nahi.

questions.explanation: Scope of practice ka matlab hai ki practitioner ko apni training aur expertise ki limits pata honi chahiye. Unhe serious medical conditions ke liye patient ko qualified medical professional ke paas refer karna chahiye.

questions.question: Hijama mein Hijama points ka selection headache ke liye kaise kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Head ke specific points (e.g., top of head, temples) aur upper back par cupping.

questions.explanation: Headaches ke liye, cupping often head ke specific points (jaise top of head, temples, ya base of skull) aur upper back par kiya jaata hai, jo tension aur blood flow ko regulate karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Continuous Professional Development (CPD) Hijama practitioners ke liye kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf certificates jama karne ke liye.
options.B: Apni skills, knowledge aur best practices ko update rakhne ke liye.
options.C: Patient ko impress karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: CPD practitioners ko latest research, techniques, aur safety guidelines ke baare mein updated rakhta hai, jisse woh apne clients ko best possible care provide kar saken.

questions.question: Hijama digestive issues (e.g., constipation, bloating) mein kaise help kar sakta hai?

options.A: Yeh digestive system ko paralyze karta hai.
options.B: Abdominal region mein blood flow badhata hai, muscle spasms kam karta hai, aur bowel movement ko stimulate karta hai.
options.D: Yeh liver ko damage karta hai.

questions.explanation: Abdominal region par Hijama blood flow ko improve karta hai, muscle spasms ko relieve karta hai, aur peristalsis ko stimulate karta hai, jisse digestive issues mein rahat milti hai.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko apni personal hygiene par dhyan kyu dena chahiye?

options.A: Sirf patient ko acha lagne ke liye.
options.B: Professionalism maintain karne, cross-contamination rokne, aur good reputation banane ke liye.
options.D: Sirf apni family ko impress karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Personal hygiene professional practice ka ek crucial part hai. Yeh cross-contamination ko rokta hai, patient trust banata hai, aur practitioner ki professional image ko maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke business aspects mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Client management, marketing, financial planning, aur legal compliance.

questions.explanation: Successful practice chalane ke liye client management, marketing strategies, financial planning, aur relevant legal guidelines ka palan karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Kaunsi condition mein Hijama ko 'supportive therapy' ke roop mein use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Chronic pain conditions (e.g., fibromyalgia, arthritis).

questions.explanation: Hijama chronic pain conditions mein supportive therapy ke roop mein effective ho sakta hai, jahan yeh inflammation kam karne aur pain management mein madad karta hai, par yeh primary treatment nahi hai.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko patient ko kab refer karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab patient ki baat samajh na aaye.
options.B: Jab patient ki condition practitioner ki scope of practice se bahar ho ya severe medical attention ki zaroorat ho.
options.C: Sirf jab practitioner ka man kare.

questions.explanation: Practitioner ko patient ko qualified medical professional ke paas tab refer karna chahiye jab unki condition unki expertise se bahar ho, ya emergency medical attention ki zaroorat ho.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko kaunse ethical code ko follow karna chahiye?

options.B: Integrity, honesty, respect for clients, aur professional competence.

questions.explanation: Ethical practice mein integrity, honesty, client ke liye respect, confidentiality, aur apni professional competence ko maintain karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Hijama ke liye advanced cupping techniques mein kya shamil ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi point par cupping karna.
options.B: Multiple cups ka strategic placement, combination of dry and wet cupping, ya moving cupping.
options.C: Cups ko bahut zyada der tak rakhna.

questions.explanation: Advanced techniques mein multiple cups ka strategic placement, dry aur wet cupping ka combination, ya moving cupping (gliding) shamil ho sakta hai, jo specific conditions ke liye tailored hote hain.

questions.question: Hijama se stress aur anxiety kaise kam ho sakti hai?

options.A: Yeh body ko aur zyada stress deta hai.
options.B: Relaxation promote karta hai, tension release karta hai, aur parasympathetic nervous system ko stimulate karta hai.
options.D: Hijama ka stress se koi lena dena nahi.

questions.explanation: Hijama body mein relaxation response ko trigger karta hai, muscle tension ko release karta hai, aur parasympathetic nervous system ko stimulate karta hai, jisse stress aur anxiety kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko apne practice ke liye kaunse laws aur regulations ki jaankari honi chahiye?

options.B: Local aur national health regulations, licensing requirements, aur waste disposal laws.

questions.explanation: Practitioner ko apne local aur national health regulations, licensing requirements, waste disposal laws, aur other relevant legal aspects ki jaankari honi chahiye taaki woh compliant aur responsible practice kar saken.

questions.question: Hijama practitioner ko apne clients ke liye 'professional boundaries' kyu maintain karni chahiye?

options.A: Client ko dur rakhne ke liye.
options.B: Trust maintain karne, ethical conduct ensure karne, aur client-practitioner relationship ko healthy rakhne ke liye.
options.D: Professional boundaries ka koi matlab nahi.

questions.explanation: Professional boundaries client-practitioner relationship mein trust, respect, aur safety maintain karne ke liye crucial hain. Yeh unethical behaviour ko rokta hai aur client ki vulnerability ko protect karta hai.
